about.title: About
about.subtitle: We are here to simplify your access to digital media and entertainment. Download, enjoy, and share moments without the limitations of extra apps.
about.missionText1: Inversave was built out of frustration with video downloader sites filled with spam ads, malicious popups, and convoluted processes. Our main mission is to create a universal downloader ecosystem that is Safe, Fast, and Easy to use for anyone, anywhere.
about.missionText2: We also integrate the most complete Asian drama streaming services (Dramabox, Melolo, Netshort) into one platform, providing a one-stop entertainment experience for all users.
about.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of other users who have made Inversave their daily tool for video downloading and drama streaming.

bantuan.title: Help & FAQ
bantuan.a1: Inversave is a multi-platform downloader that allows you to download videos and audio from various social media (like TikTok, Instagram, YouTube) and provides free and paid (VIP) entertainment streaming services.
bantuan.q2: 2. How do I download a video?
bantuan.a2: Simply copy the link (URL) of the video you want to download, then paste it into the search box on the main page or our specific social media downloader page. Press the download button, and the system will process the link to give you download quality options.
bantuan.a3: Yes, Inversave's basic downloading service is 100% free. Each user will be given a daily or weekly limit (credit) to use. If this limit runs out, you can Top Up to get premium access.
bantuan.q4: 4. What are the benefits of being a VIP?
bantuan.a4: VIP users enjoy *Unlimited Streaming* for the entire DramaBox, Melolo, Netshort, and DramaWave collections without reducing their regular credit balance. You also get faster download priority.
bantuan.a5: Download failures usually occur because: the link (URL) is invalid, the video is set to private (Private Account), or there are changes to the social media source's API. Make sure the link is publicly accessible.
bantuan.csSubtitle: Our Customer Service team is ready to assist you through the available communication channels.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer & DMCA
disclaimer.subtitle: Legal disclaimer and copyright protection (DMCA) notice at Inversave.
disclaimer.p1: Inversave is an intermediary software service (tool/downloader) that retrieves data from public application programming interfaces (APIs) or parses web pages that are already openly published on the internet.
disclaimer.importantText: We (Inversave) DO NOT host, store, re-transmit through our servers, or pirate audiovisual files (.mp4, .mp3, etc.) permanently on our local servers/databases. All file traffic is routed directly from third-party platform Content Delivery Networks (CDNs) to end-user local devices.
disclaimer.li2a: All credits, intellectual property rights (IPRs), and content monetization belong solely to the Original Creators and the respective Social Media Platforms (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, etc.).
disclaimer.li2b: The Search system on our site only displays metadata and URL open representations (much like a Google search engine), not hosting pirated copies of those search results.
disclaimer.p3a: We highly respect the intellectual property rights of others. Given the nature of this platform as a tool rather than a host, we may not have a direct technical means to remove specific individual content from the origin API or the internet.
disclaimer.p3b: Nevertheless, if you are a copyright holder or an authorized agent, and you believe a link to your copyrighted work accessible through the Inversave service violates the law, you may submit a request to block the search/reading of a specific URL from our tool by including the following details:
disclaimer.cli1: 1. Detailed identification of the copyrighted material claimed to have been infringed.
disclaimer.cli2: 2. The exact link (specific URL) as used in our tool pointing to the material.
disclaimer.cli3: 3. Contact information of the complaining party (name, address, phone number, and a valid email address).
disclaimer.cli4: 4. A good faith statement that the complaining party has the exclusive right allegedly infringed.
disclaimer.p4: Send a complete DMCA notification or URL blacklist request to our legal and operational email:

privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.subtitle: The confidentiality and security of your data is Inversave's top priority. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when using our services.
privacy.p1: When you use Inversave, we may collect some basic information:
privacy.li1a: Includes IP address, browser type, and access timestamp for traffic analysis and error fixing purposes.
privacy.li1b: For users logging in using Google, we store your email, profile name, and profile picture according to OAuth authorization for profile identification and Top Up balance/credit management purposes.
privacy.li1c: We may log abstract URL links from public downloads for cache service optimization, but we do not permanently store the content files you download on our main servers.
privacy.p2: The information collected is used solely for:
privacy.li2a: Ensuring smooth operation of downloader and streaming services.
privacy.li2b: Processing account credit systems and payment integration.
privacy.li2c: Blocking abuse (bots/spam) or manipulation of free limits.
privacy.li2d: Improving features based on traffic statistics.
privacy.p3: Inversave is committed to implementing capable technical measures in encrypting your data transfers and preventing unauthorized access leaks. We NEVER sell or distribute your personal data to third parties for commercial gain (Data Brokers).
privacy.p4: Our system works with third-party electronic payment platforms to process Top Ups. Your credit card, account, and payment method data are managed exclusively by the respective Payment Gateway regulated by OJK or leading banks; Inversave does not store your primary payment data.
privacy.p5: Inversave reserves the right to change or modify this Privacy Notice at any time. Significant updates will be notified on the main website.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: By using the Inversave site and services, you agree to all the guidelines, rules, and conditions set forth below in full. Please read carefully.
terms.p1: Accessing the site or performing download and streaming processes through Inversave constitutes an action that states you have read, understood, and are willing to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use this platform.
terms.p2: As a user, you promise to:
terms.li2a: Not use Inversave or our infrastructure for purposes and actions that violate local, national, or international laws.
terms.li2b: Be fully aware of legal responsibilities when downloading/redistributing copyrighted material. Downloads are intended ONLY FOR PERSONAL USE.
terms.li2c: Not use DDoS attacks, spiders, robots, or automatic exploitation types to overload Inversave server performance.
terms.p3: We reserve the right to limit free usage (Free Usage Limit) in the form of "Credit" allocations. Calculation, proxy/VPN abuse detection, and credit reset policies are the absolute authority of Inversave and can be calibrated at any time by the platform to ensure optimal operations.
terms.li4a: All balance purchases and VIP package transactions are final. We do not process cancellation/refund systems for purchase errors made by users.
terms.li4b: Unused credit balance assets may have an expiration date as stated in the respective profile/package menu.
terms.p5: Inversave is provided "AS IS". We do not provide full guarantees that any type of URL/video submitted to the platform will always be extractable or free from interruptions (downtime). Any external API interruptions are beyond our control.
terms.note: Operational decisions and service termination due to violations of these terms are entirely the right of Inversave without having to provide any compensation.
terms.effective: These Terms & Conditions are effective from:

docs.title: 📖 Documentation
docs.subtitle: A complete guide on how to use all downloader & search engine features.
docs.d1Desc: Download YouTube videos (MP4) or audio (MP3) in high quality up to 4K.
docs.d1Step1: Copy the YouTube video link you want to download.
docs.d1Step2: Paste the link into the input field on the main page.
docs.d1Step4: Select the format & quality you want (e.g., 1080p, MP3).
docs.d2Desc: Download TikTok videos without watermark or photo slides (if the post is images).
docs.d2Step1: Open a TikTok video, click Share -> Copy Link.
docs.d2Step2: Paste the link on the main page.
docs.d2Step4: Select 'No Watermark' for a clean video or download audio only.
docs.d3Desc: Download Reels, Videos, Photos, or Carousels from Instagram.
docs.d3Step1: Open an Instagram post, click the three dots -> Link / Copy Link.
docs.d3Step2: Paste the link on the main page.
docs.d3Step4: All media in the post will appear and can be downloaded one by one.
docs.d4Step2: Paste it on the main page and click 'Download'.
docs.d5Desc: Also supports: Pinterest, Spotify, SoundCloud, Bilibili, CapCut, Threads, Twitter (X), Terabox, Mediafire, etc.
docs.d5Step1: The method is the same: Just copy the link from the platform.
docs.d5Step2: Paste it on the main page.
docs.d5Step3: The system will auto-detect the platform and display results.
